title: The Broken Player
description: A horror mod that fills your Minecraft world with tension and the eerie feeling of being watched.
body:
# discontinued


## This Mod works only in Singleplayer
# !!Warning!!, this mod can crash your game or kick you from the world. If you don't want to be kicked, type the following command" /tbpkick false " . And if you don't want that the game crashes , type the following command" /tbpcrash false ".


## The Broken Player



*The Broken Player* is a horror-themed Minecraft mod that transforms the way you experience the game. In this world, shadows are not just shadows, and silence is never safe. A mysterious, relentless entity stalks you, appearing unpredictably — sometimes at the edge of your vision, sometimes right behind you. Every whisper, every footstep, every subtle movement could be the moment it’s watching.

### 👁️ Features & Experience

* **A haunting new mob**: The Broken Player never stays in one place. It moves silently, appearing in unexpected locations, keeping you on edge wherever you go.
* **Creepy ambient sounds**: Whispers, footsteps, and eerie noises make every area feel tense and unpredictable.
* **Mysterious structures**: Explore hidden, dark places tied to the origin of this terrifying entity. Each structure is designed to create suspense and surprise.
* **Reworked spawn mechanics**: Encounters are now more unpredictable and balanced, making every exploration a tense experience.
* **Improved stability & bug fixes**: Enjoy smoother gameplay with fewer interruptions, letting you focus entirely on the fear.

## inspired by many horror mods

## most inspired by no_moon.jar anf the broken script
PLEASE PLAY THESE MODS

the broken script: [https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script)

no_moon.jar:[https://modrinth.com/mod/no_moon.jar](https://modrinth.com/mod/no_moon.jar)

### This mod is in beta so feedback would be very helpful if you want to give the mod feedback go to the Issue Report link and fill out the google form and write what you like or don't like about the mod or you can write both.
